case_title: CAL COAST WATERPROOFING, INC. VS. GARY PIATANESI MR.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAL COAST WATERPROOFING, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-23-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-04-2010 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. PLAINTIFF STATES THAT PROCESS SERVER DROPPED OF POS IN THE IN-BOX FOR SMALL CLAIMS IN ROOM 103 ON JULY 21, 2010. NO PROOF OF SERVICE INDICATED AS FILED IN THE ROA. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,141.80 FILED BY CAL COAST WATERPROOFING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PIATANESI MR., GARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-2010 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-04-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-04-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-04-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAL COAST WATERPROOFING, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PIATANESI MR., GARY $726.50 PRINCIPAL, $132.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $859.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
